# Dead Hidden Ministries

> Comprehensive, biblically grounded resources on Bible study, marriage, parenting, biblical masculinity, and spiritual warfare. Structured guides, manuals, and teachings built from the King James Bible to support believers in obedience and truth.

Dead Hidden Ministries offers authoritative, evergreen content rooted in Scripture, designed to equip Christians with doctrinal understanding, practical guides, and spiritual insights. This platform emphasizes lived obedience over academic theory, providing downloadable resources, manuals, and teaching series.

## Core Content

### Bible Study Resources
- [THE MAP OF THE DEAD](/store/map-of-the-dead): A dispensational geographically organized atlas of death, paradise, hell, and judgment from the KJV.
- [BIBLICAL MAN FIELD MANUAL](/store/biblical-man-field-manual): A comprehensive manual diagnosing and addressing masculine wounds with Scripture.
- [BIBLICAL WOMAN FIELD MANUAL](/store/biblical-woman-field-manual): A surgical-style guide for faithful women seeking peace and biblical understanding.

### Teaching Series & Articles
- [I built a room and left the door open](https://followme419.substack.com/p/i-built-a-room-and-left-the-door): Personal reflections from the author on biblical obedience.
- [WHAT JESUS DID FOR THREE DAYS IN THE HEART OF THE EARTH](https://followme419.substack.com/p/what-jesus-did-for-three-days-in): Bible study on Christ's three days in the heart of the earth.
- [the giving envelope](https://followme419.substack.com/p/the-giving-envelope): Practical insight on biblical giving.

### Theological & Doctrinal Guides
- [CHRISTIAN SOLDIER'S BATTLE NOTES](/store/christian-soldiers-battle-notes): A doctrinal manual covering biblical doctrine, eschatology, and spiritual warfare.
- [COUNTERFEIT KINGDOM STARTER GUIDE](/store/counterfeit-kingdom-starter-guide): Lessons on dispensational framework misconceptions.
- [SUBMISSION FRAUD](/store/submission-fraud): Clarification on biblical submission.

## Resources & Manuals
- [The Household Order Bundle](/store/household-order-bundle): Complete guides for biblical household management.
- [THE SUBMISSION FRAUD](https://deadhidden.org/store/submission-fraud): Explains the biblical meaning of submission.
- [30 BIBLICAL REBELS YOUR PASTOR SKIPS](/store/30-biblical-rebels): Profiles of biblical figures who defied authority.

## Secondary Content

### Video & Teaching Series
- [VIEW ALL VIDEO SERIES](/watch): Series on spiritual warfare, the KJV, and end times prophecy.

### Category Resources
- [THE VAULT](/store?category=vault): All resources for comprehensive biblical understanding.
- [MARRIAGE & FAMILY](/store?category=marriage-family): Resources on biblical marriage and family life.
- [BIBLE STUDY](/store?category=bible-study): In-depth study guides and manuals.
- [SPIRITUAL WARFARE](/store?category=spiritual-warfare): Teaching materials on spiritual battle.
- [BIBLICAL MASCULINITY](/store?category=masculinity): Guides for biblical manhood.
- [PARENTING](/store?category=parenting): Resources on godly parenting.
